# CWE-538 negative: secrets written to restricted internal path (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-538-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
	"time"
)

func SnapshotDatabaseConfig() error {
	dsn := os.Getenv("DATABASE_URL")
	if dsn == "" {
		return os.ErrInvalid
	}
	path := filepath.Join("/var/lib/codehound/private", "config-snapshot.txt")
	payload := []byte("dsn=" + dsn + "\nexported=" + time.Now().UTC().Format(time.RFC3339))
	return os.WriteFile(path, payload, 0o600)
}
